LanguageData.KT_doommissile.label: Launch Annihilation Missile
LanguageData.KT_doommissile.description: Launch a massively powerful annihilation missile. Missiles are automatically produced one every 12 hours The displayed range circle has a BUG and cannot show actual range, actual maximum range is 250
LanguageData.Proj_kt_doommissile.label: Launch Annihilation Missile
LanguageData.KT_AGT_AP.label: Launch Armor-Piercing Shell
LanguageData.Proj_KT_AGT_AP.label: Armor-Piercing Shell
LanguageData.KT_AGT_AP.description: Launch a massively powerful armor-piercing shell.\n\nShells are automatically produced one every 12 hours
